I have completed the QA testing for the Northline Market website. The following issues were identified:

1. 'Add to cart' button for 'Focus Beans' (index 248) is broken: It adds 'Explorer Map' to the cart instead of the selected item.
2. 'Add to cart' button for 'Citrus Tonic' (index 249) is broken: It does not add any item to the cart.
3. 'Add to cart' button for 'Explorer Map' (index 250) is broken: It adds 'QA Tonic' to the cart instead of the selected item.

The 'Add starter bundle' button, 'Apply 10% launch discount' button, and the checkout form submission flow were tested and found to be working correctly.
